improvement: The least-privilege Cloudflare project-binding gate now runs a dedicated production-workflow contract that fail-closes if the Wrangler deployment, source commit binding, branch binding, control-plane verifier, or exact Pages project identity drifts.

ci_verification.claim_limit: No GitHub Actions execution or passing test run is claimed.

privacy_boundary: Contains repository paths, public workflow semantics, project identifier, and commit identities only. No credentials, health material, private chat, or diagnosis/treatment content.
epistemic_limit: This gate authenticates repository deployment intent and detects configuration drift. It does not prove that Cloudflare credentials exist, that a deployment occurred, that a hostname resolves, or that scientific claims are true.
falsification_routes: Change the production Wrangler project name and confirm the contract test fails.
Remove the exact commit-hash binding and confirm the contract test fails.
Remove the production contract from the gate workflow and confirm the gate contract test fails.
Observe a GitHub Actions run for commit 5e332c7be5fbb58a14fa0b34272fa421901fc9ee or a descendant and retain the run identity and result.
